title: Baked Cod with Harira Crust
description: A French-inspired dish where cod is topped with a flavorful harira crust and baked to perfection.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the cod fillets with salt and moroccan.
Mix harira, robust, and light in a bowl.
Place the cod fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Top each cod fillet with the harira mixture.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Check the internal temperature of the fish to ensure it reaches 145°F (63°C).
